description: Open the Sentinel-2 True Color Image at /home/ga/snap_data/sentinel2_tci.tif. Create a spatial subset of the image with dimensions strictly smaller than the original. Enhance the visual contrast of the subsetted image and add both a North Arrow and a Scale bar to the view. Export the final view as a PNG to /home/ga/snap_exports/press_release_map.png and export the subsetted raster data as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/subset_tci.tif.
